label.zh: Maerki Baumann · 解绑型(英文版)

description.en: Zurich-based private bank that spun off its transaction-platform business as Incore Bank and now focuses solely on building customer relationships and curating products from external boutiques.
description.zh: 苏黎世私人银行,将交易平台业务剥离为独立的 Incore Bank,自身仅专注于经营客户关系和从外部金融产品商店中精选产品。
